# 通过视频链接获取视频号基础信息

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/wxvideo:
    post:
      summary: 通过视频链接获取视频号基础信息
      deprecated: false
      description: >+

        传入参数 feed_info 就是 视频链接  点击分享按钮  找到 复制链接 进行复制

        视频链接示例：https://weixin.qq.com/sph/Aaajs9Yoiy




        ![d2600ddb-91c7-4017-8dd3-11fdd2d91a6e.png](https://api.apifox.com/api/v1/projects/4919579/resources/647072/image-preview)

        | 字段 |说明  |

        | --- | --- |

        code = 0  |调用成功

        20001    |金额不足

        -2     |视频无法播放

        50000    |服务器内部错误



        | 字段 |说明  |

        | --- | --- |

        object_id       |该视频的唯一id

        v2_name| 视频号唯一id 可用于获取视频号历史记录

        nickname|视频号昵称

        title|视频的标题

        cost            |花费

        remain_money    |余额

      tags:
        - 视频号接口
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                feed_info:
                  type: string
                  description: >-
                    微信客户端复制的链接 比如：https://weixin.qq.com/sph/Aaajs9Yoiy   或者
                    https://channels.weixin.qq.com/finder-preview/pages/sph?id=Aaajs9Yoiy 

                    或者9-10位数id  Aaajs9Yoiy  都支持 
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: 极致了key （0.1/次）
                type:
                  type: string
                  description: 固定值12
                verifycode:
                  type: string
                  description: 验证码如果设置了需要传
              required:
                - feed_info
                - key
                - type
                - verifycode
              x-apifox-orders:
                - feed_info
                - key
                - type
                - verifycode
            example:
              feed_info: https://weixin.qq.com/sph/Aaajs9Yoiy
              key: '{{key}}'
              type: '12'
              verifycode: ''
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                    description: 0 =成功
                  msg:
                    type: string
                  data:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      object_id:
                        type: string
                        description: 视频 id
                      object_nonce_id:
                        type: string
                        description: 视频  nonce_id
                      nickname:
                        type: string
                        description: 视频号名字
                      v2_name:
                        type: string
                        description: 视频号uid
                      title:
                        type: string
                        description: 标题
                      cover_url:
                        type: string
                        description: 封面
                      publish_time:
                        type: integer
                        description: 发布时间戳
                      publish_time_str:
                        type: string
                        description: 发布时间
                      media_type:
                        type: integer
                        description: 4视频 2图片 9直播
                      fav_count:
                        type: integer
                        description: 大拇指点赞
                      like_count:
                        type: integer
                        description: 小心心喜欢
                      forward_count:
                        type: integer
                        description: 转发数
                      comment_count:
                        type: integer
                        description: 评论数
                    required:
                      - object_id
                      - object_nonce_id
                      - nickname
                      - v2_name
                      - title
                      - cover_url
                      - publish_time
                      - publish_time_str
                      - media_type
                      - fav_count
                      - like_count
                      - forward_count
                      - comment_count
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - object_id
                      - object_nonce_id
                      - nickname
                      - v2_name
                      - title
                      - cover_url
                      - publish_time
                      - publish_time_str
                      - media_type
                      - fav_count
                      - like_count
                      - forward_count
                      - comment_count
                  cost:
                    type: number
                  remain_money:
                    type: number
                required:
                  - code
                  - msg
                  - data
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - code
                  - msg
                  - data
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
              examples:
                '1':
                  summary: 成功
                  value:
                    code: 0
                    msg: success
                    data:
                      object_id: '14905119612324878878'
                      object_nonce_id: '3999320192828691893_0_207_0_0'
                      nickname: 央视新闻
                      v2_name: >-
                        v2_060000231003b20faec8c7e78d10cad5c60ce835b07750c30d46f2375d2e2b76d9fd609427c4@finder
                      title: 英雄荣归故里！以国之名迎接忠烈回家！
                      cover_url: >-
                        https://finder.video.qq.com/251/20304/stodownload?encfilekey=rjD5jyTuFrIpZ2ibE8T7YmwgiahniaXswqzsqJYbGSzOW8p0WyR8jOrqKRgT9DMuianO7DLPP3BZiceP6VsY1g2axficmzCtk3ZjZhghfqnianl64pZRw9zFpJsuA&token=[REDACTED]&hy=SH&idx=1&m=&scene=2&uzid=1&picformat=200&wxampicformat=503
                      publish_time: 1776828719
                      publish_time_str: '2026-04-22 11:31:59'
                      media_type: 4
                      fav_count: 93502
                      like_count: 65502
                      forward_count: 5653
                      comment_count: 112
                    cost: 0.1
                    remain_money: 26840.299
                '2':
                  summary: 视频无法播放
                  value:
                    code: -2
                    msg: '视频无法播放,原因: 此内容暂时无法播放'
                    data: {}
                    cost: 0.2
                    remain_money: 29663.244
                '3':
                  summary: 视频设置隐私
                  value:
                    code: -2
                    msg: '视频无法播放,原因: 此内容暂时无法播放'
                    data: {}
                    cost: 0.2
                    remain_money: 29663.244
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 视频号接口
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-447634016-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
